data.description_suggestion: Triggers the execution of a workflow in Polly. Requires the workflow ID as input. The workflow will be initiated immediately and executed according to its configuration. Returns a workflow execution response containing the execution ID and status. The workflow may send messages or notifications to configured Slack channels or users as part of its execution.
data.reasoning: Original description is empty, leaving AI agents unable to determine when to use this operation or what it accomplishes. Added context about workflow execution, required inputs, immediate execution behavior, return value, and potential side effects (Slack notifications).

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the results and response data from a completed or in-progress workflow execution. Requires the workflow ID or execution ID as input. data.description_suggestion: Creates a new single-question poll in Slack. Accepts a PollRequest object containing poll configuration (question, choices, audience targeting, reminders, and metadata).
